label: Log entry
description: Defines a battle or gameplay log entry type referenced by maneuver and combat systems.

iconMiss.label: Icon miss
iconMiss.description: Texture path for the icon shown when this log entry records a missed attack.

iconDamaged.label: Icon damaged
iconDamaged.description: Texture path for the icon shown when this log entry records a damaging hit.

iconDamagedFromInstigator.label: Icon damaged from instigator
iconDamagedFromInstigator.description: Texture path for the icon shown from the instigator's perspective when damage is dealt.

basic-log-entry.label: Basic log entry
basic-log-entry.description: Minimal log entry with only the required inherited identity fields.
